title: astragalus perdurans
intro: Astragalus perdurans, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family (Fabaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its adaptogenic properties, which help the body adapt to stress and promote overall well-being. The medicinal properties of Astragalus perdurans include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health, making it a popular remedy for a range of health issues. Astragalus perdurans can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
